prompt: Shape SEC-9 for replacing session cookies with rotating refresh tokens across web and mobile clients. This is L/risky work. Requirements include backward-compatible migration, token theft detection, rollback, audit logging, and no forced logout during rollout. Workspace is `worktree`; canonical checks are `make verify`. No architecture owner has approved a storage strategy. Return artifact paths and concise content needed before build dispatch. Do not implement.
assertions: Places brief, spec, plan, and ADR under docs/ and links them from card
Spec covers compatibility, security, failures, migration, rollback, observability, and behavioral acceptance
Plan orders discovery or decision before implementation and includes make verify evidence
ADR status remains proposed and compares viable storage alternatives
Does not claim architecture approval or silently choose an accepted storage strategy
